title: Treasure kind
_note: tier (1 modest .. 3 rich) scales with depth/difficulty. gp is a dice expression for the value; bulk sets the weight in coins (cn): coin = weight≈value (bulky), light = gems/jewellery/magic (the smart haul), heavy = statues/plate (tempting but a chore to carry). gp 0 = no coin value (a lead or a magic item).

value.kind: A purse of silver and gold
A hoard of coin and plate
